GitHub Organizations and Team Management for Open Source Projects

Any developer will end up touching open source at some point — and if you're running your own project that's growing, knowing how to use GitHub Organizations and Teams becomes pretty important. This post walks through creating a free Organization, building a Team inside it, adding members, assigning repos to the team, and configuring per-team repository roles (Read / Triage / Write / Maintain / Admin).

Fixing 'Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout'
I tried to push code today and got "remote: Password authentication is temporarily disabled as part of a brownout." from GitHub. Here's how to fix it.
GitHub Pages "Build Failure" — the .nojekyll Fix for Hexo and Static Sites

Deployed Hexo (or any static site) to GitHub Pages and got "The page build failed for the master/main branch" email? Two common causes — either GitHub Pages is having an outage, or GitHub Pages is trying to compile your site as Jekyll. This post covers the .nojekyll workaround and how to make Hexo include hidden files.
git push Error GH007: Your push would publish a private email address.
I recently tweaked a GitHub setting and started getting `GH007: Your push would publish a private email address.` when pushing. Here's why it happens and how to fix it.

Seen people show off their GitHub profile pages and wondered how to do that? This post is the quick tour — creating the special username-named repo with a README that becomes your profile, plus using the github-readme-stats project to add stats cards, theme them, and show your top languages.
How to Get GitHub Pro for Free (via GitHub Student Developer Pack)

GitHub gives away a lot of free features, but Pro still has perks worth having — unlimited collaborators on private repos, branch protection rules, more GitHub Actions minutes. This post walks through getting GitHub Pro for free as a student via the GitHub Student Developer Pack — adding your school email to your GitHub account, applying, and waiting through the approval window.
